Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Pretext: TypeScript library for multiline text measurement and layout 46 upvotes, 2 comments
  2. Neovim 0.12.0 44 upvotes, 3 comments
  3. AyaFlow: A high-performance, eBPF-based network traffic analyzer written in Rust 39 upvotes, 3 comments
  4. The Failure of the Thermodynamics of Computation (2010) 35 upvotes, 3 comments
  5. CSS is DOOMed 457 upvotes, 108 comments
  6. The Epistemology of Microphysics 11 upvotes, 0 comments
  7. Show HN: Create a full language server in Go with 3.17 spec support 64 upvotes, 13 comments
  8. C++26 is done ISO C++ standards meeting, Trip Report 16 upvotes, 1 comments
  9. The loneliness of A Room of One’s Own 29 upvotes, 4 comments
  10. The RISE RISC-V Runners: free, native RISC-V CI on GitHub 54 upvotes, 11 comments
  11. Show HN: QuickBEAM – run JavaScript as supervised Erlang/OTP processes 15 upvotes, 1 comments
  12. Voyager 1 runs on 69 KB of memory and an 8-track tape recorder 122 upvotes, 44 comments
  13. I turned my Kindle into my own personal newspaper 138 upvotes, 51 comments
  14. Police used AI facial recognition to wrongly arrest TN woman for crimes in ND 179 upvotes, 70 comments
  15. Full network of clitoral nerves mapped out for first time 73 upvotes, 24 comments
  16. Nitrile and latex gloves may cause overestimation of microplastics 413 upvotes, 182 comments
  17. A nearly perfect USB cable tester 214 upvotes, 104 comments
  18. The rise and fall of IBM's 4 Pi aerospace computers: an illustrated history 23 upvotes, 7 comments
  19. Netscape News Feed Straight Out of the Late 00s 18 upvotes, 5 comments
  20. LinkedIn uses 2.4 GB RAM across two tabs 355 upvotes, 237 comments
  21. Alzheimer's disease mortality among taxi and ambulance drivers (2024) 192 upvotes, 130 comments
  22. The bot situation on the internet is worse than you could imagine 126 upvotes, 87 comments
  23. Show HN: BreezePDF – Free, in-browser PDF editor 21 upvotes, 9 comments
  24. Miasma: A tool to trap AI web scrapers in an endless poison pit 213 upvotes, 169 comments
  25. Twice this week, I have come across embarassingly bad data 59 upvotes, 45 comments
  26. Cuts in publishing and book reviewing imperil the future of narrative nonfiction 42 upvotes, 31 comments
  27. First Western Digital, now Sony: The tech giant suspends SD card sales 17 upvotes, 11 comments
  28. Show HN: Sheet Ninja – Google Sheets as a CRUD Back End for Vibe Coders 52 upvotes, 56 comments
  29. When do we become adults, really? 36 upvotes, 58 comments
  30. VR Is Not Dead 18 upvotes, 31 comments

Last generated 2:30am, 30 March 2026. Source here.
